misc.title: Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way
misc.text: Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this?

misc.title: Berserk just got a HUGE update… and no one saw this coming 😳🔥 A brand-new anime adaptation by WIT Studio was announced just 1 hour ago. This could finally be the Berserk adaptation fans have been wa
misc.text: Berserk just got a HUGE update… and no one saw this coming 😳🔥 A brand-new anime adaptation by WIT Studio was announced just 1 hour ago. This could finally be the Berserk adaptation fans have been waiting for… 🩸⚔️ Do you think they’ll nail it?

misc.title: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, i
misc.text: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, it kinda looks like it says “March 29”… 👀 I don’t know, judge for yourselves, but this feels off in a real way. 🩸⚔️ Daily Berserk 𒉭 (@daily_berserk) Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this? — https://nitter.net/daily_berserk/status/2039053928663253083#m
